testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_300] Ensure S3 lifecycle configuration sets period for aborting failed uploads
[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_53] Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_70] Ensure S3 bucket does not allow an action with any Principal
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
[NONE][CKV_AWS_237] Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_70] Ensure API gateway method has authorization or API key set
[NONE][CKV_AWS_59] Ensure there is no open access to back-end resources through API
[NONE][CKV_AWS_217] Ensure Create before destroy for API deployments
[NONE][CKV_AWS_73] Ensure API Gateway has X-Ray Tracing enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_120] Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_364] Ensure that AWS Lambda function permissions delegated to AWS services are limited by SourceArn or SourceAccount
[NONE][CKV_AWS_301] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_276] Ensure Data Trace is not enabled in API Gateway Method Settings
[NONE][CKV_AWS_308] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is set to encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_225] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_319] Ensure that CloudWatch alarm actions are enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_319] Ensure that CloudWatch alarm actions are enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_374] Ensure AWS CloudFront web distribution has geo restriction enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_110] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_356] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

[NONE][CKV_AWS_227] Ensure KMS key is enabled

failure.message: Ensure CloudFront distributions should have origin failover configured

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudfront_distribution.frontend_distribution File: /cloudfront.tf: 5-99 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-310
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_174] Verify CloudFront Distribution Viewer Certificate is using TLS v1.2

failure.message: Verify CloudFront Distribution Viewer Certificate is using TLS v1.2

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudfront_distribution.frontend_distribution File: /cloudfront.tf: 5-99 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-networking-63
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_27] Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_117] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured inside a VPC

failure.message: Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured inside a VPC

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.my_lambda File: /lambda.tf: 115-159 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-aws-lambda-function-is-configured-inside-a-vpc-1
115 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "my_lambda" { 116 | function_name = "my-lambda-function" 117 | # Path to the deployment package 118 | filename = "dist/lambda_function.zip" 119 | source_code_hash = filebase64sha256("dist/lambda_function.zip") 120 | 121 | # Replace with your handler and runtime as needed 122 | handler = "index.handler" 123 | runtime = "nodejs20.x" # Updated to non-deprecated runtime 124 | 125 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_role.arn 126 | 127 | # Enable X-Ray tracing 128 | tracing_config { 129 | mode = "Active" 130 | } 131 | 132 | # Set concurrent execution limit 133 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 100 134 | 135 | # Configure Dead Letter Queue 136 | dead_letter_config { 137 | target_arn = aws_sqs_queue.lambda_dlq.arn 138 | } 139 | 140 | environment { 141 | variables = { 142 | ENVIRONMENT = "production" 143 | S3_BUCKET_NAME = aws_s3_bucket.schedule_files.id 144 | DYNAMODB_TABLE = aws_dynamodb_table.schedule_history.name 145 | } 146 | } 147 | 148 | # Encrypt environment variables with KMS 149 | kms_key_arn = aws_kms_key.lambda_key.arn 150 | 151 | # Configure timeout and memory 152 | timeout = 60 153 | memory_size = 256 154 | 155 | tags = { 156 | Name = "Academic Schedule Lambda" 157 | Environment = "production" 158 | } 159 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_272] Ensure AWS Lambda function is configured to validate code-signing

failure.message: Ensure AWS Lambda function is configured to validate code-signing

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.my_lambda File: /lambda.tf: 115-159 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-272
115 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "my_lambda" { 116 | function_name = "my-lambda-function" 117 | # Path to the deployment package 118 | filename = "dist/lambda_function.zip" 119 | source_code_hash = filebase64sha256("dist/lambda_function.zip") 120 | 121 | # Replace with your handler and runtime as needed 122 | handler = "index.handler" 123 | runtime = "nodejs20.x" # Updated to non-deprecated runtime 124 | 125 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_role.arn 126 | 127 | # Enable X-Ray tracing 128 | tracing_config { 129 | mode = "Active" 130 | } 131 | 132 | # Set concurrent execution limit 133 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 100 134 | 135 | # Configure Dead Letter Queue 136 | dead_letter_config { 137 | target_arn = aws_sqs_queue.lambda_dlq.arn 138 | } 139 | 140 | environment { 141 | variables = { 142 | ENVIRONMENT = "production" 143 | S3_BUCKET_NAME = aws_s3_bucket.schedule_files.id 144 | DYNAMODB_TABLE = aws_dynamodb_table.schedule_history.name 145 | } 146 | } 147 | 148 | # Encrypt environment variables with KMS 149 | kms_key_arn = aws_kms_key.lambda_key.arn 150 | 151 | # Configure timeout and memory 152 | timeout = 60 153 | memory_size = 256 154 | 155 | tags = { 156 | Name = "Academic Schedule Lambda" 157 | Environment = "production" 158 | } 159 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_40] Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles (Reducing access management complexity may in-turn reduce opportunity for a principal to inadvertently receive or retain excessive privileges.)

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles (Reducing access management complexity may in-turn reduce opportunity for a principal to inadvertently receive or retain excessive privileges.)

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_user_policy_attachment.leonardo_api_gateway_policy File: /policy.tf: 166-169 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/iam-16-iam-policy-privileges-1
166 | resource "aws_iam_user_policy_attachment" "leonardo_api_gateway_policy" { 167 | user = data.aws_iam_user.leonardo.user_name 168 | policy_arn = aws_iam_policy.api_gateway_management_policy.arn 169 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_356] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.stage File: /api_gateway.tf: 144-174 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-51
144 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "stage" { 145 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.deployment.id 146 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.api.id 147 | stage_name = "prod" # Stage name, e.g., prod, dev, test 148 | 149 | # Enable X-Ray tracing 150 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 151 | 152 | # Enable caching 153 | cache_cluster_enabled = true 154 | cache_cluster_size = "0.5" # 0.5 GB cache 155 | 156 | # Access logging 157 | access_log_settings { 158 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gateway_access_logs.arn 159 | format = jsonencode({ 160 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 161 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 162 | caller = "$context.identity.caller" 163 | user = "$context.identity.user" 164 | requestTime = "$context.requestTime" 165 | httpMethod = "$context.httpMethod" 166 | resourcePath = "$context.resourcePath" 167 | status = "$context.status" 168 | protocol = "$context.protocol" 169 | responseLength = "$context.responseLength" 170 | }) 171 | } 172 | 173 | depends_on = [aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gateway_access_logs] 174 | }

144 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "stage" { 145 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.deployment.id 146 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.api.id 147 | stage_name = "prod" # Stage name, e.g., prod, dev, test 148 | 149 | # Enable X-Ray tracing 150 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 151 | 152 | # Enable caching 153 | cache_cluster_enabled = true 154 | cache_cluster_size = "0.5" # 0.5 GB cache 155 | 156 | # Access logging 157 | access_log_settings { 158 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gateway_access_logs.arn 159 | format = jsonencode({ 160 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 161 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 162 | caller = "$context.identity.caller" 163 | user = "$context.identity.user" 164 | requestTime = "$context.requestTime" 165 | httpMethod = "$context.httpMethod" 166 | resourcePath = "$context.resourcePath" 167 | status = "$context.status" 168 | protocol = "$context.protocol" 169 | responseLength = "$context.responseLength" 170 | }) 171 | } 172 | 173 | depends_on = [aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gateway_access_logs] 174 | }
